channel.title: Content Planning on The Age of AI with Alan McCarthy
channel.description: Recent content in Content Planning on The Age of AI with Alan McCarthy

item.title: How to Create a Social Media Content Plan for Solopreneurs in 2026
item.description: How to Create a Social Media Content Plan for Solopreneurs in 2026 You’re a solopreneur, wearing every hat in your business, and social media feels like a black hole. You know you need to post consistently to grow your audience, but coming up with ideas, writing captions, and scheduling posts eats up hours you don’t have. Worse, when you skip posting for a week, your engagement tanks, and you’re back to square one.

item.title: How to Create a LinkedIn Content Strategy That Gets Results as a Solopreneur
item.description: How to Create a LinkedIn Content Strategy That Gets Results as a Solopreneur You’re a solopreneur or freelancer, and LinkedIn feels like a goldmine of opportunities—if only you could crack the code. You know you should be posting regularly to build your brand, connect with clients, and establish authority. But every time you open the app, you’re stuck staring at a blank screen, wondering what to say that doesn’t sound forced or salesy.
